svg.text: Mini Blinky (W=4) — selector-level wiring · one fan-in mux per multi-source sink (no shared data bus)
Trapezoid = data selector; its output is the ONLY driver of the sink it feeds → no contention. Single-source paths are hardwired.
shared 4-bit data bus · read ▸ to TOS-src mux · write ◂ from buffer
Not drawn (1-bit control glue): ALU_Cn carry-in select (H / L / /C, GAL4); stack /CS,/WE derived from the 191 pointers; 194 mode S1/S0 from GAL1.
